title: Wix Documentation
prompt_source: Inline docs prompt; CONNECTOR_DOCUMENTATION_GUIDELINES fetched via getDocGuidelines()

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
**Wix** is a website-builder + headless CaaS platform exposing a REST API suite under `https://www.wixapis.com`. This connector — `WixConnector` (`CONNECTOR_TYPE = "wix"`, `AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`) — wraps the operational surfaces a Shielva tenant typically needs from a Wix site:

| Surface | Base path | Capability |
|---|---|---|
| Sites | `/site-list/v2/sites` | List + read sites under the account |
| Stores Products | `/stores-reader/v1/products` + `/stores/v1/products` | List, get, create, update products |
| Ecom Orders | `/ecom/v1/orders` | List + read orders |
| Contacts | `/contacts/v4/contacts` | List + create contacts |
| Members | `/members/v1/members` | Site member registry |
| Blog | `/blog/v3/posts` | Blog posts |
| Bookings | `/bookings/v2/bookings` | Booking instances |
| Subscriptions | `/subscriptions/v1/subscriptions` | Recurring subscriptions |

The connector normalises products + orders + contacts into `NormalizedDocument` (id = `f"{tenant_id}_{source_id}"`), surfaces standalone `async def` methods per user-requested operation (OCP), retries 429/5xx with exponential backoff (3 attempts), and never embeds raw HTTP in `connector.py` (SOC — all HTTP delegated to `client/http_client.py::WixHTTPClient`).

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.content:
### 1. Generate a Wix API key

1. Sign in to https://www.wix.com.
2. Open **Settings → API Keys** (top-right account menu).
3. Click **Generate API Key**, grant the scopes you need (Stores Read+Write, Ecom Read+Write, Members Read, Contacts Read+Write, etc.).
4. Copy the API key value — Wix shows it only once.
5. Copy your **Account ID** from the same page (UUID format).
6. From **My Sites → Settings → Site Settings**, copy the **Site ID** of the Wix site you want to connect.

### 2. Install in ACP

In **ACP → Manage Connectors → Wix**, fill in:

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `api_key` (secret) | API key from step 4 |
| `account_id` (text) | Account UUID |
| `default_site_id` (text, optional) | Default Site ID — methods accept site_id override per call |
| `base_url` (text, optional) | Override `https://www.wixapis.com` (rarely needed) |
| `rate_limit_per_min` (number) | Soft cap, default 100 |

Click **Install**. `install()` validates `api_key` + `account_id` are present (it does NOT call the API), initialises the `WixHTTPClient`, and returns `ConnectorStatus(HEALTHY, CONNECTED)`.

### 3. First health check

The gateway calls `health_check()` which lists 1 site as a lightweight probe. On 2xx → `HEALTHY + CONNECTED`. On 401 → `OFFLINE + TOKEN_EXPIRED`. On 403 → `UNHEALTHY + INVALID_CREDENTIALS`. On 429 → `DEGRADED + CONNECTED` with structured-log warning.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content:
Wix REST API uses **server-to-server API key authentication** (`AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`). No OAuth dance, no token refresh, no expiry.

### Credential model

- `api_key` is sent in the `Authorization` header as the **raw key** — **no `Bearer` prefix** (Wix-specific gotcha).
- `account_id` is sent in the `wix-account-id` header.
- `site_id` is sent in the `wix-site-id` header for site-scoped endpoints (Stores, Orders, Members, Bookings, Forms, Blog). Omit for account-only endpoints (Sites list).

### Lifecycle

| Phase | Behaviour |
|---|---|
| `install()` | Validates `api_key` + `account_id`. Initialises `WixHTTPClient`. Does **not** call any Wix endpoint. |
| `authorize(...)` | Returns an empty `TokenInfo` — there is no token exchange. |
| `health_check()` | `GET /site-list/v2/sites?paging.limit=1` — minimal probe. |
| `ensure_token()` | Not called — no token to refresh. |
| token storage | None. |

### Header contract

Every outbound request:

```
Authorization: <api_key>           ← raw, no Bearer prefix
wix-account-id: <account_id>
wix-site-id:    <site_id>          ← when site-scoped
Content-Type:   application/json
```

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content:
### Install fields (per-tenant)

Read via `self.config.get(...)` in `connector.py::__init__` — never hardcoded.

| Key | Type | Required | Read in code | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `api_key` | secret | yes | `self.api_key` | Authorization header value |
| `account_id` | text | yes | `self.account_id` | `wix-account-id` header |
| `default_site_id` | text | no | `self.default_site_id` | Per-call default site for site-scoped endpoints |
| `base_url` | text | no | `self.base_url` (defaults to `https://www.wixapis.com`) | Override for Wix sandbox or proxy |
| `rate_limit_per_min` | number | no | `self.rate_limit_per_min` (default 100) | Client-side soft cap |

### Class constants (provider-wide)

```python
REQUIRED_CONFIG_KEYS = ["api_key", "account_id"]
_STATUS_MAP = {
    401: ("OFFLINE",   "TOKEN_EXPIRED"),
    403: ("UNHEALTHY", "INVALID_CREDENTIALS"),
    429: ("DEGRADED",  "CONNECTED"),
}
_WIX_BASE = "https://www.wixapis.com"
```

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content: All public async methods on `WixConnector`. SOC: connector.py orchestrates only; HTTP lives in `client/http_client.py::WixHTTPClient`.

children.title: Lifecycle
children.content:
### `async install() -> ConnectorStatus`
Validate `api_key` + `account_id`; initialise `WixHTTPClient`. Does NOT call the API.

### `async authorize(auth_code, state) -> TokenInfo`
No-op for api_key auth — returns an empty TokenInfo with metadata.

### `async health_check() -> ConnectorStatus`
Lists 1 site via `GET /site-list/v2/sites?paging.limit=1`. Classifies failures by `_STATUS_MAP`.

### `async sync(since=None, full=False, kb_id=None, webhook_url=None) -> SyncResult`
Iterates Wix products, orders, contacts → `NormalizedDocument` → `ingest_batch`. Returns `SyncResult` with `documents_synced / _failed / _found`.

children.title: Sites
children.content:
### `async list_sites(*, paging_limit=10, paging_offset=0) -> Dict`
`GET /site-list/v2/sites?paging.limit={N}&paging.offset={O}`.

### `async get_site(site_id: str) -> Dict`
`GET /site-list/v2/sites/{site_id}`.

children.title: Stores (Products)
children.content:
### `async list_products(site_id, *, paging=None, query=None) -> Dict`
`POST /stores-reader/v1/products/query` — body: `{query: {paging: {...}, filter: {...}}}`.

### `async get_product(site_id, product_id) -> Dict`
`GET /stores-reader/v1/products/{product_id}`.

### `async create_product(site_id, product) -> Dict`
`POST /stores/v1/products` — body: `{product: {...}}`.

### `async update_product(site_id, product_id, product) -> Dict`
`PATCH /stores/v1/products/{product_id}` — body: `{product: {...}}`.

children.title: Ecom (Orders)
children.content:
### `async list_orders(site_id, *, paging=None, filter=None, sort=None) -> Dict`
`POST /ecom/v1/orders/search` — body: `{search: {filter, sort, cursorPaging}}`.

### `async get_order(site_id, order_id) -> Dict`
`GET /ecom/v1/orders/{order_id}`.

children.title: Contacts + Members
children.content:
### `async list_contacts(site_id, *, paging=None, filter=None) -> Dict`
`POST /contacts/v4/contacts/query` — body: `{query: {paging, filter}}`.

### `async create_contact(site_id, info) -> Dict`
`POST /contacts/v4/contacts` — body: `{info: {...}}`.

### `async list_members(site_id, *, paging=None) -> Dict`
`POST /members/v1/members/query` — body: `{query: {paging}}`.

children.title: Blog · Bookings · Subscriptions
children.content:
### `async list_blog_posts(site_id, *, paging=None) -> Dict`
`POST /blog/v3/posts/query`.

### `async list_bookings(site_id, *, paging=None) -> Dict`
`POST /bookings/v2/bookings/query`.

### `async list_subscriptions(site_id, *, paging=None) -> Dict`
`POST /subscriptions/v1/subscriptions/query`.

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
Exception hierarchy in `exceptions.py`:

```
WixError                              # base; carries status_code + response_body
├── WixAuthError                      # 401 / 403
├── WixBadRequestError                # 400
├── WixNotFoundError                  # 404
├── WixConflictError                  # 409
├── WixPreconditionError              # 428 (revision mismatch)
├── WixRateLimitError                 # 429 — retry_after_s
└── WixServerError                    # 5xx
```

Back-compat aliases preserved:
```
WixNetworkError = WixServerError      # legacy name from older code
WixNotFound     = WixNotFoundError
```

### Retry behaviour (`client/http_client.py::_request`)

| Status | Action |
|---|---|
| 400 / 401 / 403 / 404 | Raise immediately |
| 429 | Exponential backoff `_BACKOFF_BASE * 2 ** attempt` (0.5s, 1s, 2s), retry up to `_MAX_RETRIES=3` |
| 5xx | Same exponential backoff, retry up to 3 |
| `httpx.TimeoutException` / `httpx.NetworkError` | Backoff, retry up to 3, then raise `WixNetworkError` |

### How errors surface to the gateway

`health_check()` catches exceptions and maps via `_STATUS_MAP`:

```
401 → ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE,   TOKEN_EXPIRED)
403 → ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)
429 → ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED,  CONNECTED)   — logged as warning
other → ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, FAILED)
```

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content:
| Symptom | Probable cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, MISSING_CREDENTIALS)` at install | `api_key` or `account_id` blank | Re-enter both in ACP. Wix shows the key only once at generation — rotate if lost. |
| `ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)` at health_check | 403 from Wix — API key lacks scope | In Wix Dashboard → API Keys, edit the key and grant Stores/Ecom/Members read scopes (whichever surfaces you use). |
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, TOKEN_EXPIRED)` at health_check | 401 — API key revoked or wrong account_id | Verify `account_id` matches the account that owns the key. Rotate the key if needed. |
| `wix.http.retry` warnings spike | Hitting 429 (Wix per-minute rate cap) | The client retries with exponential backoff. Lower `rate_limit_per_min` or batch fewer requests. |
| 404 on a site-scoped call | `site_id` not provided OR wrong site | Pass `site_id` arg explicitly OR set `default_site_id` install_field. Verify the site belongs to the account. |
| `ImportError: cannot import name 'WixNetworkError'` | Older exceptions.py without back-compat aliases | Already fixed — `WixNetworkError = WixServerError` alias added in `exceptions.py`. |
| Webhook payloads land but signature mismatch | `webhook_secret` not the same as Wix's webhook HMAC | Re-enter the exact secret in both Wix Dashboard and ACP install field. |
